mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification( receiver_id, type, content, url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{url}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, type, content, url, read_at AS readAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId}
ORDER BY created_at ASC ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET read_at = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND ISNULL(read_at)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notification WHERE type = 'ADMIN_NOTICE' AND url = CONCAT('/notices/', #{noticeId})
